name: Mama's Marinara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cans, 28 oz each of tomatoes or
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep 10-inch frying pan, heat the olive oil and gently saute the garlic.
2. Add the tomatoes (or tomato paste).
3. Cook on medium heat for 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Tear the basil leaves into small pieces and sprinkle on top after adding to pasta sauce.
5. Add pepper and grated cheese to taste.
Alternative:
1. Add 1 medium onion, finely chopped, and saute the onion with the garlic until limp.
2. If fresh tomatoes are used, put them in a pot of boiling water for about 10 seconds until the skin can be easily peeled off. Discard the skin. Cut tomatoes into pieces and add to frying pan mixture. Add tomato paste.
